name: Ed Hershey
bio: Ed Hershey is listed as a We The People candidate in IL-04 in public ballot summaries. His filing appears in the 2026 open-seat district coverage. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
